articles.title: Camara beats Inthraphuvasak to F2 pole position at Spa
articles.summary: Rafael Camara achieved his fourth pole position of the season after coming out on top at Friday afternoon’s Spa-Francorchamps qualifying.

articles.title: What the teams said – Friday in Belgium
articles.summary: The drivers and teams report back on all the action from Friday practice at Spa-Francorchamps for the 2026 Belgian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Our expert guide to in-race betting at Spa
articles.summary: When the lights go out at Spa, bettors will be watching closely to make accurate predictions in real-time.

articles.title: Are Antonelli and Mercedes the partnership to beat in Belgium?

articles.title: Alpine offer update after Gasly's FP2 crash in Belgium
articles.summary: Alpine has given an update after Pierre Gasly's crash in Free Practice 2 ahead of the Belgian Grand Prix which brought out the red flag.

articles.title: Hamilton gives take on Ferrari's Friday in Belgium
articles.summary: Lewis Hamilton appeared optimistic that Ferrari will find a fix for their early struggles at the Belgium Grand Prix.

articles.title: Verstappen wary of gap to rivals despite ‘good day’ at Spa
articles.summary: Max Verstappen shared his satisfaction at maximising Red Bull’s package during Friday's running at the Belgian Grand Prix, but admitted that the sessions also exposed the deficit to their rivals.

articles.title: Antonelli calls for more from Mercedes after Friday running
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli believes "there's still a lot of work to do as a team", despite the Italian and Mercedes finishing fastest in Friday practice ahead of the Belgian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Norris cautious of McLaren's Belgian GP chances
articles.summary: Lando Norris believes that McLaren is "still probably the fourth fastest" car on the grid despite an encouraging day of practice ahead of the Belgian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Antonelli fastest in Belgium FP2 ahead of Norris
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli finished fastest in Free Practice 2 ahead of the Belgian Grand Prix, the Mercedes driver heading McLaren's Lando Norris and Red Bull's Max Verstappen.
